summary: M6-CLIENT-ALPHA-SURFACES-001 is CLOSED after PR #145 merged into origin/main at 0f621d9ce41c15916894cccf3ea67acfdc23aad3. The integrated implementation adds read-model-driven Alpha client flow from scenario selection through victory/failure status, non-placeholder diplomacy/legitimacy/succession/policy/event/encyclopedia/AI-adviser/map-candidate/checkpoint surfaces, and preserves the no manual node battle, telemetry, server account, and arbitrary-code mod boundaries.

Continue M6 autonomous execution by running taskctl ready and selecting M6-LAYERED-AI-001 as the highest-priority dependency-ready task unless the task graph changes.
